hooks.command: python -c "import sys,subprocess; from pathlib import Path; cwd=Path('.').resolve(); root=next((p for p in [cwd]+list(cwd.parents) if (p/'.claude').exists()),cwd); data=sys.stdin.buffer.read(); candidates=[root/'orquestacion_agentes'/'.agent'/'hooks'/'guard_paths.py', root/'.agent'/'hooks'/'guard_paths.py', root/'agent_system'/'.agent'/'hooks'/'guard_paths.py']; guard=next((p for p in candidates if p.exists()), None); sys.exit(0 if guard is None else subprocess.run([sys.executable,str(guard)],input=data,capture_output=False).returncode)"
